options.name: -clock_period
options.description: Period of dominant clock of the design, in library time units

options.name: -max_slack
options.description: Slack limit of endpoints to be modeled, in library time units

options.name: -pre_simulation_period
options.description: pre simulation duration, actual start time of simulation

options.name: -simulation_period
options.description: Duration of transient simulation, in library time units

options.name: -user_defined_critical_paths
options.description: collection of criitcal paths to be modeled on priority
